asset_name: Enemy attack, block, shield, and HP-hit VFX

final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy attack VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: create a production candidate sprite sheet for enemy attack, block, shield, and HP-hit feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 sheet: slash arc, heavy impact, shield block flash, armor crack, red damage burst, poison or dark swipe, stone shockwave, warning spike, enemy charge glow, small hit spark.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability.
Composition/framing: 5x2 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding.
Lighting/mood: tactical enemy feedback, threatening but not gory.
Color palette: red and orange impacts, blue and silver shields, dark violet enemy magic, white highlights.
Constraints: PNG with REAL transparent alpha background. Background must be truly transparent pixels in the exported file, not a simulated pattern. No checkerboard, no white/gray/black backdrop, no fake transparency preview grid, no rectangular matte, no frame, no panel, no labels, no text, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery.
generation_mode: built-in imagegen chroma-key fallback plus deterministic adaptive extraction
